meta.title: The Online degree with BCA in Software Engineering in India
meta.description: Build your career as a software engineer with the BCA in Software Engineering program. Learn coding, software design, and app development with expert mentorship.

mainEntity.name: What is a BCA in Software Engineering?

acceptedAnswer.text: A BCA in Software Engineering is a 3-year undergraduate program that focuses on building strong foundations in programming, software development, application design, databases, and core IT technologies required for modern tech careers.

mainEntity.name: Who should pursue a BCA in Software Engineering?

acceptedAnswer.text: Students interested in programming, app development, software design, system analysis, and IT-based roles will benefit most from this course. It’s also suitable for those aiming for higher studies such as MCA or M.Tech.

mainEntity.name: What is the eligibility criteria for BCA in Software Engineering?

acceptedAnswer.text: Candidates must have completed 10+2 from a recognized board in any stream. While basic computer knowledge is an advantage, it is not mandatory, as the program begins with foundational IT and programming concepts.

mainEntity.name: What is the duration of the BCA in Software Engineering program?

acceptedAnswer.text: The BCA in Software Engineering program is a 3-year undergraduate course divided into 6 semesters. It includes classroom theory, hands-on lab sessions, mini-projects each year, and a final major project in the last semester.

mainEntity.name: What subjects are taught in the BCA Software Engineering syllabus?

acceptedAnswer.text: The BCA Software Engineering syllabus covers a strong mix of programming, IT fundamentals, and software development concepts. Core subjects include C, C++, Java, Python, Data Structures, DBMS, Operating Systems, Computer Networks, Web Technologies, Software Testing, Cloud Fundamentals, and Software Engineering methodologies. Most programs also include practical labs, mini-projects, and a final-year project.

mainEntity.name: Do I need prior programming knowledge to join?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, you don’t need any prior programming experience. The course begins with foundational concepts and beginner-friendly programming modules, ensuring students from all academic backgrounds can learn and progress comfortably into advanced software development topics.

mainEntity.name: What career opportunities are available after BCA in Software Engineering?

acceptedAnswer.text: Graduates of BCA in Software Engineering can pursue a variety of roles in the IT industry, including Software Developer, Web Developer, Java/Python Developer, UI/UX Designer, QA Tester, System Analyst, Database Administrator, and IT Support Engineer. The program also opens doors to careers in software consulting, cloud computing, and emerging technology roles.

mainEntity.name: What are the salary expectations after completing a BCA in Software Engineering?

acceptedAnswer.text: After completing a BCA in Software Engineering, fresh graduates can expect a starting salary of ₹3–6 LPA, depending on their skills, internships, and projects. With experience and specialization in areas like software development, web technologies, or database management, salaries can grow significantly, reaching ₹8–12 LPA or more in mid-level roles.

mainEntity.name: Can I pursue higher studies after BCA in Software Engineering?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, after completing BCA in Software Engineering, students can opt for MCA, MBA, M.Sc. in Computer Science, or M.Tech (via bridge programs). You can also pursue specialized certifications in software development, cloud computing, cybersecurity, and emerging technologies to enhance career opportunities.

mainEntity.name: Can I work while studying BCA in Software Engineering?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, BCA students can work while studying. Many take internships, freelance projects, and part-time IT roles during their second and third years to gain practical experience and enhance their resumes.

heading: The overview of
BCA in Software Engineering Program
overViewOfOnline.subHeading: Code Your Career to Create the Next Innovation

content.value: at Teksversity is designed for learners who dream of becoming professional developers, software architects, or tech innovators. This comprehensive online program blends theory and practice, focusing on software design, development methodologies, project management, and cloud-based application building. Students work with real development environments, building scalable web, mobile, and enterprise software. They gain strong programming skills, learn version control tools like Git, and master agile workflows. The curriculum also includes modules on UI/UX design, database management, and software testing, ensuring holistic learning for today’s tech-driven roles.

keyPoints: Learn end-to-end software development lifecycle
Gain expertise in multiple programming languages
Master software design, testing, and deployment practices
Understand Agile, DevOps, and CI/CD principles
Build a strong portfolio of live projects and applications

heading: Why Choose BCA in Software Engineering in
Teksversity?
title: 13 Years of
Legacy
(Commitment, Growth, Success)
whyOnline.initialDescription: Choosing Teksversity for your BCA in Software Engineering means learning directly from experienced professionals who have engineered real-world products and large-scale digital systems. The curriculum blends innovation, coding excellence, and hands-on learning, preparing students for dynamic roles in startups and enterprise environments alike. Each subject is designed to connect classroom learning with industry applications for true job readiness.

description.firstDescription: At Teksversity, students gain mentorship from expert software developers and industry practitioners who guide them through live projects, coding sprints, and simulation-based assessments. This ensures every learner not only understands theoretical concepts but also applies them through practical, performance-driven tasks that mirror real development challenges.

description.secondDescription: Your BCA in Software Engineering at Teksversity is more than an academic qualification it’s a launchpad to a successful career in technology. With strong placement support, personalized career guidance, and certification-oriented learning, students graduate with the technical confidence and professional mindset to innovate, lead, and shape the future of software development.

Live web and mobile app development projects
Practice-based learning with Git and GitHub
Deep dive into UI/UX and software architecture
Workshops on DevOps and cloud integration
Real-time debugging and testing simulations

Continuous code review and performance feedback
Hybrid or fully online study options

Collaboration with IT and software companies

Real-time projects for practical job readiness

testimonialCards.name: Vishal
testimonialCards.review: I took a Data science with ai , IIT Certification course and tejaswi mam helped me to get into the Best course, now I got a job in Accent company with 6.5lpa. Thank you Teksversity Team and special thanks to madam .

testimonialCards.name: Vinitha P
testimonialCards.review: This Dual Certification course in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics is fantastic. The trainers are knowledgeable and the practical projects helped me apply concepts effectively. A must for anyone looking to excel in marketing and analytics!

testimonialCards.name: sadhana chittennoju
testimonialCards.review: I enrolled in the online Data Science course at Teksversity in March 2025. The Python, ML modules, real-world projects, and weekly assignments were very useful. Good placement support. It helped me build a strong portfolio. Great for career switchers

testimonialCards.name: Arun Pasunuri
testimonialCards.course: Data Science with AI and ML
testimonialCards.review: Joining TEKSVERSITY changed the way I learn. The dual certification programs boosted my confidence, and the hands-on training gave me real industry experience. Their zero down-payment EMI support truly helps students. TEKSVERSITY inspires you to grow.

testimonialCards.name: Ramadevi Koduri
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is the best place to learn dual certification in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics. I wanted to study two relevant courses for my MBA, and their counsellor guided me perfectly. I enrolled in both programs with confidence.

testimonialCards.name: Meghana
testimonialCards.review: My experience with Teksversity was amazing! The counselling session with Sireesha Reddy ma’am at Secunderabad helped me choose the right course. She patiently cleared all my doubts and gave great career clarity.

testimonialCards.name: Divya Peddiwar
testimonialCards.course: Data Science and Python full stack
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is where growth meets opportunity! Their dual courses and online degree programs helped me learn in multiple directions. The mentors boosted my skills and confidence, and the experience truly transformed the way I learn.

testimonialCards.name: Gayathri Prayaga
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity Education Institution exceeded my expectations! The faculty is knowledgeable and supportive. The curriculum is relevant and industry-focused. I appreciated the career services and opportunities provided. Highly recommended!

testimonialCards.name: Raghavenderan G
testimonialCards.review: Great institute with quality education at an affordable price. They offer trending, industry-ready courses and practical, supportive teaching. Their tie-ups with top universities add huge value. Highly recommended for strong learning and career growth.

testimonialCards.name: Laxmi Gayathri Chelimeda
testimonialCards.review: I took the Data Science course at Teksversity and gained strong practical, hands-on knowledge. The mentors were very supportive and explained concepts clearly. I’m also grateful for the career opportunity I received. A great learning experience
